mapper.sql: select s.*, coalesce(scope_stat.scope_count, 0) as scope_count, coalesce(warehouse_stat.warehouse_count, 0) as warehouse_count, coalesce(channel_stat.channel_count, 0) as channel_count, case when s.scope_type = 'ALL_BUYERS' then '全部买家' else coalesce(scope_stat.scope_summary, '') end as scope_summary, case when s.warehouse_scope_mode = 'ALL_WAREHOUSES' then '全部仓库' else coalesce(warehouse_stat.warehouse_summary, '') end as warehouse_summary, coalesce(channel_stat.channel_summary, '') as channel_summary from quote_scheme s left join ( select scheme_id, count(1) as scope_count, group_concat(coalesce(buyer_level_name_snapshot, buyer_name_snapshot) order by scope_id asc separator ', ') as scope_summary from quote_scheme_scope group by scheme_id ) scope_stat on scope_stat.scheme_id = s.scheme_id left join ( select scheme_id, count(1) as warehouse_count, group_concat(warehouse_name_snapshot order by scheme_warehouse_id asc separator ', ') as warehouse_summary from quote_scheme_warehouse group by scheme_id ) warehouse_stat on warehouse_stat.scheme_id = s.scheme_id left join ( select scheme_id, count(1) as channel_count, group_concat(customer_channel_name_snapshot order by display_order asc, scheme_channel_id asc separator ', ') as channel_summary from quote_scheme_channel group by scheme_id ) channel_stat on channel_stat.scheme_id = s.scheme_id
mapper.update: update quote_scheme set scheme_name = #{schemeName}, scheme_type = #{schemeType}, fee_source_mode = #{feeSourceMode}, currency_code = #{currencyCode}, scope_type = #{scopeType}, warehouse_scope_mode = #{warehouseScopeMode}, effective_time = #{effectiveTime}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, effective_priority = #{effectivePriority}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where scheme_id = #{schemeId}
update quote_scheme set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where scheme_id = #{schemeId}
update quote_scheme set warehouse_scope_mode = #{warehouseScopeMode}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where scheme_id = #{schemeId}
mapper.select: select * from quote_scheme_scope where scheme_id = #{schemeId} order by scope_id asc
select * from quote_scheme_warehouse where scheme_id = #{schemeId} order by scheme_warehouse_id asc
select * from quote_scheme_channel where scheme_id = #{schemeId} order by display_order asc, scheme_channel_id asc
mapper.update: update quote_scheme_channel set customer_channel_code = #{customerChannelCode}, customer_channel_name_snapshot = #{customerChannelNameSnapshot}, operation_fee_code = #{operationFeeCode}, operation_fee_name_snapshot = #{operationFeeNameSnapshot}, freight_fee_code = #{freightFeeCode}, freight_fee_name_snapshot = #{freightFeeNameSnapshot}, status = #{status}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where scheme_id = #{schemeId} and scheme_channel_id = #{schemeChannelId}
mapper.select: select * from quote_scheme_value_fee_rule where scheme_id = #{schemeId} order by display_order asc, value_fee_rule_id asc
mapper.update: update quote_scheme_value_fee_rule set logistics_channel_code = #{logisticsChannelCode}, logistics_channel_name_snapshot = #{logisticsChannelNameSnapshot}, trigger_code = #{triggerCode}, calculation_method = #{calculationMethod}, adjustment_direction = #{adjustmentDirection}, adjustment_value = #{adjustmentValue}, status = #{status}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where scheme_id = #{schemeId} and value_fee_rule_id = #{valueFeeRuleId}
